case_title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. HELEN C. WALKER ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, HELEN C. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 347 DOLORES STREET, #103 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, HELEN C. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) COPY IN DEPT 501 OUTBOX
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, HELEN C. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF $7.06 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, HELEN C.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, HELEN C.
DECLARATION RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, HELEN C. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA SERVED AUG-02-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA SERVED AUG-02-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, HELEN C.
